case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. YELENA BEKBULATOVA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEKBULATOVA, YELENA $2,746.20 PRINCIPAL, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,036.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
